summary: EXP-282 drafts a single-paragraph insertion into WIN-026 detail_evidence that preempts the surviving advocate defense (defense_survives=3) — "anti-solar convergence is itself perspective." The new paragraph closes the loophole by stating the projective-geometry fact: vanishing points at BOTH antipodes are the perspective signature of parallel rays specifically; a finite-altitude source emits a radial fan of non-parallel rays that share their source as a common point but never its antipode. Apply EXP-282 (targeted insertion OR full-field overwrite produce the same result), then close ISS-1790 with defense_survives downgraded to 1–2.
